home.title: Welcome
home.tagline: The AI assistant that answers your customers on WhatsApp, books appointments, and sends reminders, around the clock.
home.comingSoon: The full dashboard arrives in the next milestone: connect your WhatsApp, add your business info, and watch the AI reply to customers.

auth.loginSubtitle: Pick up where you left off.
auth.signupSubtitle: One minute of setup, then your AI assistant gets to work.
auth.genericError: Something went wrong. Check your connection and try again.

onboarding.profileSubtitle: This is what the AI uses to speak for your business.
onboarding.verticalHint: For example: salon, clinic, spa, tutor, garage.
onboarding.modulesHint: This decides which tools your dashboard shows. You can change it later in Settings.
onboarding.modules_shopHint: A catalog your AI sells from, bargains included.
onboarding.modules_bothHint: Bookings and selling in one place.
onboarding.loadError: Could not load your business info. Refresh the page to try again.
onboarding.saveError: Could not save. Check your connection and try again.

connect.title: Connect your WhatsApp
connect.subtitle: Scan the code with the phone that has your business WhatsApp.
connect.step2: Tap Menu (or Settings), then Linked devices, then Link a device.
connect.step3: Point your phone at this code.
connect.connectedHint: Your WhatsApp is live. Customers who message you will now appear in your Inbox.
connect.startError: Could not start the connection. Try again in a moment.
connect.banRiskDisclosure: Honest note: this starter connection uses an unofficial WhatsApp link. It is affordable and quick, but WhatsApp may restrict numbers that send too much too fast. We pace your messages automatically to protect you. An official upgrade path is coming.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.emptyHint: Share your WhatsApp number with a customer to see them here.
inbox.loadError: Could not load conversations. Check your connection.
inbox.selectHint: Choose a conversation on the left to read and reply here.

thread.sendError: Your reply did not go out. Try again.
thread.loadError: Could not load this conversation. Check your connection.

knowledge.title: Add your business info
knowledge.subtitle: Paste or upload what customers ask about: services, prices, opening hours, location. The AI answers only from this.
knowledge.docContentHint: Write it like you would tell a customer.
knowledge.docContentPlaceholder: We open Monday to Saturday, 9:00 to 19:00. Braiding costs TZS 25,000...
knowledge.emptyHint: Add your services and prices so the AI can answer customers.
knowledge.loadError: Could not load your business info. Check your connection.
knowledge.saveError: Could not save. Check your connection and try again.

appointments.title: Bookings
appointments.reminderNote: Reminders go out automatically before the appointment, once the customer has agreed to receive them.
appointments.emptyHint: Create a booking from a conversation or with the button above.
appointments.loadError: Could not load bookings. Check your connection.
appointments.saveError: Could not save the booking. Check the details and try again.

homeDash.title: Today
homeDash.noUpcomingHint: Bookings you create will show up here.
homeDash.loadError: Could not load your overview. Check your connection.
homeDash.noPendingOrdersHint: New orders from chat will appear here.
homeDash.ordersError: Could not load orders. Check your connection.

contacts.title: Customers
contacts.name: Name
contacts.tagsHint: Separate tags with commas, for example: vip, braids.
contacts.emptyHint: Customers who message your WhatsApp will appear here.
contacts.loadError: Could not load customers. Check your connection.

products.title: Products
products.name: Product name
products.descriptionHint: What the AI tells customers about this product.
products.minPriceHint: The AI can bargain down to this price but never below it. Customers never see it. Leave empty for a fixed price.
products.deleteConfirm: Delete this product? Existing orders keep their copy of it.
products.emptyHint: Add your first product and the AI can start selling it.
products.loadError: Could not load products. Check your connection and try again.
products.saveError: Could not save. Check the values and try again.
products.invalidNumbers: Prices must be whole numbers above zero.

onboardingProducts.title: Add your first products
onboardingProducts.subtitle: Give the AI something to sell. You can add photos and more products later under Products.
onboardingProducts.name: Product name
onboardingProducts.minPriceHint: The AI bargains down to this but never below. Customers never see it.
onboardingProducts.saveError: Could not save this product. Check the values and try again.
onboardingProducts.invalidNumbers: Prices must be whole numbers above zero.

orders.title: Orders
orders.cancelConfirm: Cancel this order? Stock returns if it was already confirmed.
orders.emptyHint: When the AI closes a sale, the order lands here for you to confirm.
orders.loadError: Could not load orders. Check your connection and try again.

notifications.label: Notifications
notifications.emptyHint: Order and stock alerts appear here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.modulesHint: Turn on the parts of WaOS you need. At least one stays on.
settings.paymentInstructionsHint: The AI sends this after recording an order, e.g. your Lipa Namba.
settings.ownerAlertPhoneHint: Your own number. New orders and low stock get sent there.
settings.ownerAlertPhoneInvalid: Enter a valid WhatsApp number in international format, e.g. +255712345678.
settings.tempPasswordNote: Share this one-time password with them in person. It will not be shown again:
settings.threshold: When should the AI answer on its own?
settings.thresholdHint: Lower means the AI answers more often; higher means it asks you more often.
settings.toneNotesHint: Short guidance the AI follows when replying.
settings.toneNotesPlaceholder: Always greet customers warmly and use simple language.
settings.loadError: Could not load settings. Check your connection.
settings.saveError: Could not save. Check your connection and try again.
settings.aiEnabledHint: Turn this off and the AI stays silent everywhere; your team answers every message.

testAi.title: Test your assistant
testAi.subtitle: Ask a question the way a customer would. You will see exactly what the AI would send.
testAi.question: Your test question
testAi.questionHint: Try asking about your prices or opening hours.
testAi.wouldHandOff: Would ask a person to step in
testAi.handoffHint: The AI hands questions it is unsure about to your Inbox, so customers never get guesses.
testAi.genericError: The test failed. Check your connection and try again.

landing.kicker: For salons, clinics, spas, tutors, garages, and shops
landing.heroTitle2: on WhatsApp, even while you work.
landing.heroSubtitle: An AI assistant that replies to your customers in Swahili or English, books their appointments, sells your products (bargaining down to the price you set), and calls you in when a human touch is needed.
landing.freeNote: Free to use in this phase. Five minutes of setup, no card needed.

demo.msg2: Karibu Nuru Salon! Braiding is TZS 25,000 and takes about two hours.
demo.msg3: Great, can I come tomorrow at 10?
demo.msg4: Yes! I have noted tomorrow at 10:00 for braiding. The team will confirm your slot shortly.
demo.sellMsg2: Yes! That is our Shea Hair Butter, TZS 20,000.
demo.sellMsg4: I can do 17,000, and that is my best price.

landing.featuresSubtitle: Built for people who run their business from a phone, between customers.

answers.title: Answers around the clock
answers.body: The AI replies from your own prices, services, and hours. It never invents an answer.

bookings.title: Bookings and reminders
bookings.body: Appointments get automatic reminders before the visit, so fewer customers forget to show up.

sells.title: Sells and bargains
sells.body: It recognizes a product from a photo, quotes your price, and haggles down to the floor you set, never below it.

language.title: Swahili and English
language.body: The assistant detects the customer's language and replies in it, politely and briefly.

step1.title: Tell it about your business
step1.body: Paste your services, prices, catalog, and opening hours, or upload a file. That becomes the AI's only source of truth.

step2.title: Connect your WhatsApp
step2.body: Scan one QR code with your business phone. Your number stays yours.

step3.title: Watch it work
step3.body: Customers get instant answers, appointments get reminders, products get sold, and tricky questions come to you.

landing.finalTitle: Give your customers an answer today
landing.finalSubtitle: Sign up, connect your WhatsApp, and let the assistant handle the routine questions and the sales while you do the real work.
landing.footerTagline: The operating system for local service and retail businesses in Tanzania, right inside WhatsApp.
